paper_title: Radiocarbon Dating and Pollen Analysis in Dahecun Core

methods.description: Process for dating sediment samples using accelerator mass spectrometry (AMS) to determine the age of the samples.

steps.description: We collected five samples for accelerator mass spectrometry (AMS) radiocarbon dating.
steps.searchable_summary: collect samples for AMS radiocarbon dating

steps.description: They were dated at the Xi'an AMS Center, China.
steps.searchable_summary: send samples to Xi'an AMS Center for dating

methods.description: Procedure for analyzing pollen in sediment samples to understand vegetation history and environmental conditions.

steps.description: A total of 149 sediment samples from the Dahecun Core were selected for pollen analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: select sediment samples for pollen analysis

steps.description: All samples were treated with HCl, KOH, HF and acetolysis.
steps.searchable_summary: treat samples with HCl, KOH, HF, and acetolysis

steps.description: To calculate pollen concentration, we added one Lycopodium spore tablet to each sample to serve as a marker.
steps.searchable_summary: add Lycopodium spore tablet to samples

steps.description: We excluded four samples which contained less than 100 pollen grains.
steps.searchable_summary: exclude samples with less than 100 pollen grains

steps.description: Approximately 150 pollen and spore grains were counted for the remaining 145 samples.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen and spore grains in samples

steps.description: Pollen percentage diagrams were constructed using the TILIA software.
steps.searchable_summary: construct pollen percentage diagrams using TILIA

methods.description: Method for drilling and sampling a core at Dahecun to study the stratigraphy and sediment composition.

steps.description: In the spring of 2008, our team drilled a core at Dahecun.
The core is 334 cm long and the lower 296 cm was sampled at 2 cm intervals for pollen analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: sample core at 2 cm intervals for pollen analysis

steps.description: Geological survey has found that the strata of this area are composed of alluvial or paleochannel deposits.
